---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
---

## Costly Commitments (*Political Research Quarterly*)

- [Online appendix](files/Appendix_costly_commitments.pdf) (.pdf)
- [R code](files/Costly_commitments.R) (.R)
- [Data (2022 Tunisia Survey)](files/data.csv) (.csv)

## Social Polarization and Electoral Incentives for Islamist De-moderation (*Democratization*)

- [Online appendix](files/Appendix_costly_commitments.pdf) (.pdf)
- [R code](files/Costly_commitments.R) (.R)
- [Data (Turkish Parliamentary Speech Corpus)](files/data.csv) (.csv)
